name: Alveolar Ridge Pickleball Club
description: Alveolar Ridge Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eagle Rock, MO. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Cassville City Park
description: Cassville City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cassville, MO. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Open Play every night throughout summer and fall months.

name: Cassville Middle School (Rock Gym)
description:
The Cassville Middle School Pickleball Club will use these courts Tuesday and Thursday mornings at 7am. These courts are not open to the public during school hours. The public may request use of the Rock Gym by contacting Lance Parnell to reserve a time to play. 

Lance Parnell: 417-847-2221

name: Kathy Bales Pickleball Court located at her home
description: Kathy Bales Pickleball Court located at her home is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Golden, MO. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Monett Area YMCA
description: Monett Area YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monett, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Monett Pickleball Hub
description: Monett Pickleball Hub is a place to play pickleball in Monett, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Members only — Guests can pay via Venmo. QR code found at the front desk.

name: South Park
description: South Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monett, MO. There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.
